empty.selectCamera: Select a camera node to add effects.

card.dragHint: Drag onto the scene tree or viewport to add

actions.addAsBillboardTitle: Add as an image layer in the active compose scene

help.animations: Learn how to load and apply animation clips to your avatar.
help.behaviors: Learn how to connect VMC motion capture and other behaviors to your nodes.
help.models: Learn how to load VRM and 3D model assets into your scene.
help.clips: Learn how to automate scene changes using the timeline and trigger clips.
help.assets: Learn what assets are and how to upload and use files in your project.
help.create: Learn how to add objects (avatars, cameras, lights, props) to your scene.
help.effects: Learn what camera effects do and how to add them.
help.presets: Learn how to save and reuse building blocks as presets.
